project_description: Customer data analytics platform (Customer Data Platform). Data unification from 8 sources (CRM, billing, network, mobile app, web), single customer view, predictive segmentation, marketing tool integration, Kafka + Spark Streaming pipeline, lakehouse on S3 + Delta Lake.
client_history: Client has data in silos — first CDP implementation.
risk_patterns: Data quality from 8 sources: each has different keys and formats — deduplication very difficult.
pm_comment: Identity resolution (linking customer records from different systems) took 35% of project.
